titles.title: エヴァンゲリオン 放送30周年記念特別興行

data.title: Evangelion: Housou 30-shuunen Kinen Tokubetsu Kougyou
data.title_japanese: エヴァンゲリオン 放送30周年記念特別興行
data.synopsis:
A new short animation for the Evangelion series that debuted at the "EVANGELION:30+; 30th ANN/VERSARY OF EVANGELION" fes. in Yokohama Arena.

Two Asuka Langleys from different timelines host a comedy stage show to celebrate the 30th anniversary of the Evangelion franchise and re-enact key scenes from the TV series and the films, hoping for Asuka Langley Sōryū to find the perfect ending to her story arc.

(Source: ANN)

titles.title: Kyouryuu Chou Densetsu 2: Darwin ga Kita Movie!
恐竜超伝説2 劇場版ダーウィンが来た！

data.title: Kyouryuu Chou Densetsu 2: Darwin ga Kita Movie!
data.title_japanese: 恐竜超伝説2 劇場版ダーウィンが来た！

data.title: Oneechan Gokko
data.synopsis:
In the distant future, Kagami Village is a suburban mountain village that has been left behind by the highly developed science and technology in urban areas. "If you're not well behaved, a look-alike will come." Higure Akane, a middle school student living in this village where an old legend still remains, was looking forward to being reunited with her older sister Higure Sui, who has been released from the hospital after a year. However, shortly after her sister's release from the hospital, Akane receives a phone call. "The person in that house is not your older sister."

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Ray (Chou Kaguya-hime! Version)
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Ray (Chou Kaguya-hime! Version) by Kaguya (CV: Yuuko Natsuyoshi) and Yachiyo Runami (CV: Saori Hayami). The song was used as the ending theme of the anime Chou Kaguya-hime!

data.title: Yani Neko
data.synopsis:
Yani is a catgirl with a seriously bad smoking habit. She smokes so much that her apartment smells like ash and is littered with cigarette butts—and plenty of other trash! Every time she tries to quit, she becomes weak to the cravings and gives in almost instantly. Will she ever get her life together, or is she doomed to live as a chainsmoking slob forever?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titles.title: Kaiba Seichoutsuu x Mass Destruction: Reload Mashup
海馬成長痛 × Mass Destruction -Reload- マッシュアップ

data.title: Kaiba Seichoutsuu x Mass Destruction: Reload Mashup
data.title_japanese: 海馬成長痛 × Mass Destruction -Reload- マッシュアップ
data.synopsis:
A mashup of ZUTOMAYO's popular song "Kaiba Seichoutsuu" and the popular song "Mass Destruction -Reload-" from "Persona 3 Reload" has been released! Enjoy it along with the original animation created specifically for this official tie-up.

(Source: Official Youtube, translated)

titles.title: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai sareta Majo desu.
I Am a Witch and My Crush Wants Me to Make a Love Potion!
どうも、好きな人に惚れ薬を依頼された魔女です。
I'm a Witch Who's Crush Requested a Love Potion

data.title: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai sareta Majo desu.
data.title_english: I'm a Witch Who's Crush Requested a Love Potion
data.title_japanese: どうも、好きな人に惚れ薬を依頼された魔女です。
title_synonyms: I Am a Witch and My Crush Wants Me to Make a Love Potion!
data.synopsis:
Deep within the forest, a cozy and rather cluttered cottage sits on the lakeshore, housing a mysterious, feared witch. In truth, she is a lovely young woman named Rose, who has learned the art of potion-making from her wise grandmother. Rose cherishes her tucked-away life, yet there is a longing in her heart—for a handsome knight she once saw, Sir Harij Azm.

For four years, Rose's feelings for Harij have lingered, but she can never act on them; witches live outside of human affairs and belong to no country or man. So, when Harij suddenly appears on her doorstep looking for a love potion, Rose is both surprised and heartbroken. Although another woman has captured the noble knight's heart, Rose decides to help him. But before crafting the potion, Rose sends Harij on a series of ridiculous quests for each ingredient, hoping to delay the inevitable and savor their fleeting time together.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Fukufuku no Chizu
data.synopsis:
The short film tells the story of a French philosopher named Sophie, who visits Fukushima Prefecture for the first time to attend a friend's wedding. Sophie loses her way in Fukushima, but a mysterious "friend" and a "map" appear before her, and she follows their lead making detours and stops. Little by little, Sophie realizes that everything in Fukushima is a "culture" that has been created by someone and has been passed down through generations.

(Source: ANN)
data.background: The second short film, after Kiyotaka Oshiyama's "Aka no Kioku" ("Red Memory"), produced by the Fukushima Map Friends Association. The aim of this project is the delivery of the comprehensive information magazine "Fukushima Map" to a wider audience.

data.title: Luca
data.synopsis:
The short film depicts a student, Nene, who encounters a shapeshifting entity by the name of Luca.

(Source: anitrendz)

data.title: Lele Bianlidian
data.synopsis:
Lele, a white dog, and Xiaoliang, a gray one-eyed cat, run a struggling convenience store. Besides selling goods, they also take on commissions to earn money. The story follows Lele and Xiaoliang as they complete various tasks, experiencing a series of small adventures together—stories about courage, understanding, and learning how to love and be loved.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Dragon's Triumph in the Celestial Realm

data.title: Long Po Jiutian
data.title_english: Dragon's Triumph in the Celestial Realm
data.synopsis:
The story unfolds in a fantastical martial arts world where ordinary people can unleash their mental and physical potential through continuous martial arts practice and internal energy cultivation. The protagonist, Lin Chen, is an ordinary martial artist of humble origins who strives for the pinnacle of skill. 

After experiencing injustice, his anger triggers his inner mental potential, entering a state of "Mind Awareness" similar to a quantum effect. However, this also allows him to witness the terrible danger his family faces in the future. Therefore, to protect his family and loved ones from fatal harm and to investigate the mystery of his father's disappearance, Lin Chen uses a mysterious list as a clue to uncover the truth behind everything, engaging in a perilous and arduous struggle against evil forces, thus weaving a legendary and moving tale.

(Source: Youku, translated)

data.title: Thunder 3
data.synopsis:
Three ordinary schoolboys come into possession of a DVD that supposedly opens a gateway to a parallel universe, but when their backs are turned Pyontarou's little sister Futaba passes through and gets kidnapped by the aliens that have overrun that version of Earth! Discovering that their cartoonish bodies make them supermen in the hyper-realistic parallel universe, the boys set out to rescue Futaba.

(Source: Kodansha USA)
data.background: Thunder 3 aired on Fuji TV's +Ultra block.

titles.title: Mairimashita! Iruma-kun: If Episode of Mafia
Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun: IruMafia Edition
魔入りました!入間くん if Episode of 魔フィア

data.title: Mairimashita! Iruma-kun: If Episode of Mafia
data.title_japanese: 魔入りました!入間くん if Episode of 魔フィア
title_synonyms: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun: IruMafia Edition
data.synopsis:
In this brand-new spinoff of the runaway hit series, Iruma is a dirt-poor but unfailingly cheerful young boy who grows up in a ruthless city slum. One day, Iruma gives an injured old man his last loaf of bread and nurses the stranger back to health—only to find out that the elder gent is none other than Don Sullivan, head of the Babyl Mafia! Soon after, Don Sullivan comes back, whisks Iruma away, and begs the boy to become his grandson. And just like that, Iruma begins his new life as the next in line to lead a gigantic gang of—dare we say—demonic mafiosos!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

titles.title: Doko yori mo Tooi Basho ni Iru Kimi e
どこよりも遠い場所にいる君へ

data.title: Doko yori mo Tooi Basho ni Iru Kimi e
data.title_japanese: どこよりも遠い場所にいる君へ
data.synopsis:
Kazuki Tsukigase is a high school boy who carries a certain secret. In search of a place where no one knows him, he enrolls at Sakijima High School on a remote island.

On Sakijima, there is a place known as the "Cove of Spiriting Away." One early summer day, Kazuki finds a girl lying unconscious in the cove. The girl—Nanao, 16 years old—later regains consciousness in the hospital, but her identity remains unknown. What is the meaning behind the word "1974" that she murmured?

A touching boy-meets-girl story.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Yuukyuu no Gusha Asley no, Kenja no Susume
The Principle of a Philosopher by Eternal Fool "Asley"
悠久の愚者アズリーの、賢者のすゝめ

data.title: Yuukyuu no Gusha Asley no, Kenja no Susume
data.title_japanese: 悠久の愚者アズリーの、賢者のすゝめ
title_synonyms: The Principle of a Philosopher by Eternal Fool "Asley"
data.synopsis:
When Asley was young, he had dropped from the Magic Academy and was looked down by others. However by chance, he discovered a god medicine and obtained an immortal body. In order to take revenge on the people who made fun of him, he started to work on the research of magic and magical artifacts much different from those developed in the academy, and before he even noticed, 5000 years have passed and he became an ancient magic user.

Losing his purpose life, Asley goes out on a journey with his familiar, Pochi, to see the world after 5000 years. With an unexpected turns of events after helping many humans, he is now living at the Magic Academy...

How a 5000-year-old with young appearance Asley will live his second life?

(Source: Official site)

data.title: Xiong Chumo: Niannian You Xiong
data.synopsis:
Briar, Bramble and Vick encounter the legendary Year Monster, Nian, who bestows them with mysterious powers, thrusting them into the hidden, chaotic, magic-infused realm of Eve City.

(Source: IMDb)
